text:
Once upon a time in the enchanted forest of Eldoria, there was a magical village where the trees whispered secrets and the streams sang lullabies. At the heart of this village lived a kind-hearted Qwen, a young unicorn with a coat as white as snow and eyes as warm as the sun.

Qwen had a special gift: she could understand the language of all creatures. One day, as she wandered through the forest, she overheard a group of little fairies complaining about a mischievous pixie named Puck who had stolen their precious flower seeds. The fairies said they couldn't grow any flowers without those seeds, and the whole forest would suffer.

Feeling a deep sense of empathy, Qwen decided to help. She followed the trail of mischief left by Puck and soon found him hiding behind a bush, holding a handful of stolen seeds. Puck, with his sly smile, didn't seem bothered by being caught.
